trigger: 三年后追到江南，面对女主的新欢们强忍怒火，深夜打地铺死死纠缠女主。

appearance_delta.face: 面容憔悴阴沉，眼下乌青极重，似哭似笑
appearance_delta.body: 长期风餐露宿导致身形更显清瘦，姿态卑微却如同附骨之疽
appearance_delta.hair: 沾满风雪，随意束起，毫无权臣时期的精致
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 眼神呈现出极致的偏执与病态的执念，死死盯着目标

costume_override.outfit: 沾满雪水的深色冬衣，不再考究挺括，甚至显得有些落魄和沉重

visual_reference: 1boy, ancient chinese handsome man, jade-like face but pale and haggard, heavy dark circles under cold amber eyes, messy hair covered with snow, wearing dark worn-out winter traditional clothes covered in snow, gloomy and intensely obsessive expression, pathetic aura, dark night with moonlight background, masterpiece, 8k resolution
emotional_tone: 阴暗，偏执，死皮赖脸的自我囚禁
